description: Welcome to Archer Green! This spacious end-unit townhome backs onto a serene greenbelt and offers 3 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms and one of the largest backyards in the complex. Filled with natural light, the home features peaceful forest views from the deck—perfect for relaxing or entertaining. A large two-car garage is complemented by additional driveway parking for 2 full sized vehicles/trucks. Archer Green is a well-managed, pet-friendly, and family-oriented clubhouse community located in the Silverdale area of Mission. Residents enjoy access to a clubhouse with an exercise room, outdoor pool and hot tub, playground, and multi-purpose room. Make this home your own.
